paper_equity.confirmation_source: Hyperliquid sandbox balance polled every 60 seconds

sizing_policy.policy: Future paper/sandbox sizing uses current realized paper equity, while realized plus unrealized PnL is shown in risk displays.

records.operator_explanation: Paper-observation signal only; creates no StrategyDecision, OrderIntent, PreparedVenueOrder, SubmittedOrder, or executable approval.
